ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: ACCOUNTING #1, REPORT, FEES, FINAL DISTRIBUTION
Off Calendar Nov-19-2010 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Rowena Navia for Kathy Nakagawa.

Ms. Navia explained the extent of services provided to support the request for extraordinary fees. The matter was taken under submission.

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Reporter: Diana Chen, CSR#11312. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Felicia Smith.

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: ACCOUNTING #1, REPORT, FEES, FINAL DISTRIBUTION

Off Calendar Sep-07-2010 Continued To Sep-28-10 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

Petition Authorizing And Directing Preliminary Distribution; And For Allowance In Compensation Of Fifty Percent Of Estimated Statutory Fees And Admininstrator And Her Attorney.
Off Calendar Apr-07-2010 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Rowena Navia for and with Kathy Nakagawa.

The Court stated that before it was a petition for preliminary distribution and that it was hoping to see Counsel from Key National today, that their non-appearance won't keep the Court from granting the petition, and that it just wanted some clarification. The Court granted the petition with the caveat regarding the 1/20th share as to George A. Cole which results in an overpayment (granted subject to review of the order). Ms. Navia addressed Mr. Cole's overpayment as set forth on the record stating that Mr. Cole's assignments exceed his share, that he is not receiving anything from the distribution, and that he won't have an overpayment. The Court stated that the assignments were between Key National and George Cole and that it would strike paragraph 10(m) and 15. Ms. Navia stated that she would speak with Counsel for Key National. The Court stated that any distributions need to be out of a Court order not out of escrow.

Judge Pro Temp: Sue M. Kaplan. Reporter: Sonia Wong, CSR#11218. Clerk: Jacqueline Alameda. Bailiff: Deputy V. Jung.

Petition Authorizing And Directing Preliminary Distribution; And For Allowance In Compensation Of Fifty Percent Of Estimated Statutory Fees And Admininstrator And Her Attorney.
